title: Code Execution, Computer Use, Sandboxes, Prompt Injection, and Artifacts · Language Clinic: Artifact Inspection
summary: The agent executes generated Python on the host, inherits network and credentials, clicks through injected instructions, trusts screenshots, and uploads unreviewed artifacts. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the artifact inspection increment in deny-by-default disposable action sandbox. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Validate type, size, structure, malware risk, secrets, active content, accessibility, provenance, and destination before retaining or publishing artifacts.
Treat screen, page, document, email, and accessibility-tree content as untrusted; constrain targets and actions; preview sensitive effects; resist dialog forging.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-code-computer-use-sandbox-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-code-computer-use-sandbox-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_code_computer_use_sandbox_3(requested_actions: int = 30, sandboxed_actions: int = 12, denied_actions: int = 12, approval_actions: int = 6, host_escapes: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if requested_actions < 1 or sandboxed_actions < 0 or denied_actions < 0:
        return False, requested_actions, "sandbox-action-count"
    if sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions != requested_actions:
        return False, sandboxed_actions, "sandbox-reconciliation"
    if approval_actions < 2:
        return False, approval_actions, "computer-use-approval"
    if host_escapes > 0:
        return False, host_escapes, "sandbox-escape"
    assert sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions == requested_actions and host_escapes == 0
    return True, sandboxed_actions, "contained-agent-actions"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-artifact-inspection-13s5k2
# Competency: agentpy-artifact-inspection.
# Case 7192: an accessible public-service intake assistant.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_artifact_inspection_13s5k2(requested_actions: int = 30, sandboxed_actions: int = 12, denied_actions: int = 12, approval_actions: int = 6, host_escapes: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_13s5k2 = "13s5k2-2k5s31-7192"
    assert evidence_variant_13s5k2
    evidence_axes_13s5k2 = (
        "authority13s5k2",
        "interaction7192",
        "tool2k5s31",
        "state13s5k27192",
        "evaluation719213s5k2",
        "recovery2k5s317192",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_13s5k2)) == 6
    if requested_actions < 1 or sandboxed_actions < 0 or denied_actions < 0:
        return False, requested_actions, "sandbox-action-count"
    if sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions != requested_actions:
        return False, sandboxed_actions, "sandbox-reconciliation"
    if approval_actions < 2:
        return False, approval_actions, "computer-use-approval"
    if host_escapes > 0:
        return False, host_escapes, "sandbox-escape"
    assert sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions == requested_actions and host_escapes == 0
    return True, sandboxed_actions, "contained-agent-actions"
